title: devcraft
description: Vanilla+ style modpack for devs private minecraft server for the homies
body:
This is DeV's Vanilla+ style mineacraft mod pack for his server.
It has a bunch of base client side mod for improvement, along with some visual mods to spice up the gameplay. It also has a few simple mods that add things like waystones, and furniture, passive skill treem, and some mob combat changes to the game.

I recommend installing this shader pack:
https://modrinth.com/shader/complementary-reimagined
